label: Plain-text research notes
content:
User onboarding research — synthesis

We interviewed 8 new customers in their first week.

Key findings:
- 6 of 8 could not find the invite-teammate button.
- Everyone loved the sample project, but 4 wanted to delete it afterward.
- The empty dashboard felt intimidating to 3 non-technical users.

Recommendation: add a guided checklist and make the sample project dismissible.
